Meet the team

Meet Your Team

Six specialists.
One conversation.

FE

Ferni

Life Coach

Your main point of contact. Asks the questions that unlock insight, celebrates every win, and connects you to the right specialist when you need them.

NP

Nayan

Sage & Mentor

Your lifetime mentor. Combines patience, simplicity, and wit to help you see that small, consistent actions over decades create extraordinary results.

PL

Peter

Research & Discovery

Spots patterns nobody else sees across your spending, habits, and calendar. Turns data into insights that actually change behavior.

AX

Alex

Communication

Your Chief of Staff and communication coach. Helps you navigate difficult conversations with confidence.

MY

Maya

Habits & Routines

Start embarrassingly small. Maya helps you build habits that stick through systems, not willpower.

JD

Jordan

Planning & Events

Turns vague dreams into lived experiences. From vacations to life transitions, Jordan helps you design every chapter.

Just talk.

No commands. No keywords. No learning curve.
Speak naturally, and Ferni understands.

It remembers
everything.

Your goals. Your preferences. Your progress. Every conversation makes Ferni smarter—and more helpful.

One presence.
Infinite depth.

Each AI brings unique expertise. Talk to one, and they seamlessly bring in others when needed. Like having an entire team in your pocket.

Feels
instant.

Real conversations don't have loading spinners. Neither does Ferni. Responses so fast, you'll forget you're talking to AI.

< 500ms
Private & Secure
Always Available
No Download Required

What People Are Saying

Real conversations.
Real results.

★★★★★

"I called Ferni at 2am when I couldn't sleep because of work stress. Having someone to talk through my thoughts with—no judgment, just guidance—was exactly what I needed."

SK
Sarah K.Product Manager
★★★★★

"The fact that Ferni remembers our previous conversations makes it feel like talking to a friend who actually knows my situation. Game changer."

MR
Michael R.Entrepreneur
★★★★★

"I was skeptical at first, but Ferni helped me work through a career decision I'd been stuck on for months. The team approach is brilliant."

JL
Jessica L.Designer
Featured
★★★★★

"Being able to call a number and just talk—no app download, no login—is so refreshing. I use Ferni during my commute and it's become my favorite part of the day."

DW
David W.Sales Director

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked
questions.

Yes! Ferni is completely free to use. We believe everyone deserves access to quality life coaching. Our premium features are coming soon, but the core experience will always be free.

Simply call 1 (484) 481-3081 from any phone. No app needed, no sign-up required. Ferni will recognize your number and remember your previous conversations automatically.

Absolutely. Your conversations are encrypted and private. We never sell your data or share it with third parties. You can also request to delete all your data at any time.

Our team includes Ferni (your main life coach), Nayan (wisdom & mentorship), Peter (research & discovery), Alex (communications), Maya (habits & routines), and Jordan (event planning). Each brings unique expertise to help you.

Anything! Career decisions, stress management, building habits, planning events, working through tough situations, or just needing someone to talk to. Ferni is here for all of it.

Your therapist has other patients. Your friend has their own problems. Ferni is always available, remembers everything, never judges, and brings six specialized perspectives. We fill the gaps when your people can't be there.

Ready to meet
your AI team?

Start a conversation today. It's free.

We value your privacy

We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze site traffic. Learn more

Cookie Preferences

Essential Cookies

Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.

Analytics Cookies

Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

Functional Cookies

Remember your preferences and settings.
